description: Operational dashboard for rollout and traffic distribution between v1 and v2. Shows active primary/shadow roles, routing topology, release actions, live traffic split, and per-instance request throughput.

panels.description:
Shows which service is currently primary or shadow, what model version it serves, how many replicas are active, and how live and mirrored traffic are distributed.

- Time — timestamp of the current rollout state shown in the row.
- Role — current router role assigned to the service (`primary` or `shadow`).
- Service — inference service currently mapped to the role.
- Runtime — model runtime used by the service (for example, `sklearn` or `onnx`).
- Model version — version of the model loaded by the service.
- Replicas — number of currently active replicas serving this model version.
- Traffic split% — share of live user traffic routed to the service.
- Traffic shadow sample% — share of requests mirrored to shadow for comparison only; this does not change the main user response path.

targets.expr:
count by (variant, job, model_version, runtime, task) (model_active_info)
* on (variant) group_left(role)
max by (variant, role) (router_active_variant == 1)

round(
  (100 * (1 - scalar(max(router_serve_shadow_rate))))
  * max by (variant, role) (router_active_variant{role="primary"} == 1)
)
or
round(
  (100 * scalar(max(router_serve_shadow_rate)))
  * max by (variant, role) (router_active_variant{role="shadow"} == 1)
)

round(
  (0)
  * max by (variant, role) (router_active_variant{role="primary"} == 1)
)
or 
round(
  (100 * scalar(max(router_shadow_sample_rate)))
  * max by (variant, role) (router_active_variant{role="shadow"} == 1)
)

panels.title: Active Rollout (Primary / Shadow)

panels.description:
Shows how the router maps current `primary` and `shadow` roles to fixed model branches.

- Router — assigns branch roles.
- primary / shadow — current routing pointers.
- v1 / v2 — rollout variants.
- inference_* — active inference services.
- /models/model/* — mounted model artifact path.
- metadata.version — loaded model version.
- Replicas — active replica count.

targets.expr:
label_replace(
  count by (variant, job, model_version, runtime, task) (model_active_info{variant="v1"})
  * on (variant) group_left(role)
  max by (variant, role) (router_active_variant{variant="v1"} == 1),
  "metadata_version", "$1", "variant", "(.*)"
)

label_replace(
  count by (variant, job, model_version, runtime, task) (model_active_info{variant="v2"})
  * on (variant) group_left(role)
  max by (variant, role) (router_active_variant{variant="v2"} == 1),
  "metadata_version", "$1", "variant", "(.*)"
)

panels.title: Active Routing Topology

panels.description: Shows recent rollout control actions such as cutover and rollback, including execution time, resulting primary version, and operation status.
panels.title: Release operation

panels.description: Shows the percentage of successful POST /predict traffic routed to v1 and v2 over time. Useful for validating cutover, rollback, and expected traffic distribution.
panels.title: Traffic Split % (v1 vs v2) — POST /predict, 2xx

panels.description: Shows successful POST /predict requests per second for each inference instance. Useful for checking per-replica load distribution, hotspotting, and scaling behavior.
panels.title: RPS by Instance — POST /predict, 2xx

title: Inference Service (v1/v2 + Scaling)
